metadata.name: bingo-elastic
classifiers: License :: OSI Approved :: Apache Software License
metadata.summary: Cartridge that provides fast, scalable, and efficient storage and searching solution for chemical information using Elasticsearch

functions.name: bingo_elastic.model.helpers.iterate_file
documentation:
---
param error_handler: lambda for catching exceptions
param file: true
param iterator: |-
  supported iterators sdf, smiles, smi, cml.
  If iterator is not set, trying to determine
  iterator by file extension
return: true
type error_handler: Optional\[Callable\[[object, BaseException], None\]\]
type iterator: str
type session: Optional[Indigo]
---

functions.name: bingo_elastic.model.helpers.load_reaction
documentation: Helper for loading reactions into IndigoRecordReaction object

classes.name: bingo_elastic.model.record.IndigoRecord

methods.name: bingo_elastic.model.record.IndigoRecord.__init__
documentation:
Constructor accepts only keyword arguments
\:param indigo_object: — create indigo record from IndigoObject
\:type indigo_object: IndigoObject
\:param name: — add name. Rewrites name from IndigoObject
\:type name: str
\:param sim_fingerprint: similarity fingerprint (sim)
\:type sim_fingerprint: List[int]
\:param sub_fingerprint: similarity fingerprint (sub)
\:type sub_fingerprint: List[int]
\:param error_handler: lambda for catching exceptions
\:type error_handler: Optional\[Callable\[[object, BaseException], None\]\]
\:param skip_errors: if True, all errors will be skipped,

> no error_handler is required

```
type skip_errors

bool
```

Base class for IndigoObject representation.
This class could not be instantiated directly, use one of the following
subclasses:
    - IndigoRecordMolecule
    - IndigoRecordReaction
